slide1.title: Welcome to SAVI
slide1.description: Your community management app that makes resident life easier.

slide2.title: Maintenance Made Easy
slide2.description: Submit and track maintenance requests with real-time updates.

slide3.title: Book Amenities
slide3.description: Reserve community facilities like gym, pool, and party halls.

slide4.title: Stay Connected
slide4.description: Get community updates and connect with your neighbors.

consent.title: Before We Continue
consent.subtitle: Please review and accept the following to continue.
consent.termsDescription: By accepting, you agree to our terms and conditions.
consent.privacyDescription: We respect your privacy and protect your data.
consent.notificationsDescription: Stay updated with community announcements and alerts.

tenant.selectCommunitySubtitle: Choose the community you want to access.
tenant.noCommunities: You are not linked to any community yet.
tenant.noLinkedCommunityDescription: Your account is not linked to any community. Contact your community administrator to get an invitation.
tenant.step1: Ask your community administrator for an invitation
tenant.step2: Click the invitation link sent to your email
tenant.step3: Your community will appear here automatically
